title: Mini Pillowy Gelatin Wraps
description: A sweet and tangy dessert made with pillowy gelatin and a hint of American flavor, wrapped in a crunchy wrap.
instructions: Dissolve gelatin in 1 cup of cold water.
Add 1 cup of boiling water and stir until gelatin is fully dissolved.
Stir in 1 teaspoon of American flavor.
Refrigerate mixture until it's slightly jiggly.
Cut pillow gelatin into small pieces.
Wrap each piece of gelatin in a large wrap.
You can also add a sprinkle of sugar or a slice of lemon on top for extra flavor.
